title:
PROMPT 035: Solar Panel + Sun вЂ” Clean Energy
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1920Г—1080px (16:9)
DURATION: 5.0s | LOOP: Yes
SVG: Solar panel system (26 paths: panel frame outer rect, 12 individual solar cell rects (3Г—4 grid), panel mount pole, panel mount base, sun circle, 8 sun ray lines, ground horizon line, house silhouette simple (5 paths), energy bolt path connecting panel to house, cloud path optional) вЂ” panel at 780Г—400px, house at 1300Г—540px

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #EFF6FF (light sky blue)
Solar panel frame fill: #374151 (dark grey)
Solar cell fill: #1D4ED8 (dark blue, active) / #DBEAFE (pale blue, inactive)
Panel mount fill: #6B7280
Sun fill: #FBBF24 (warm gold)
Sun rays stroke: #F59E0B (amber, 3px)
Ground line fill: #D1FAE5 (light green)
House fill: #F59E0B (amber) / roof #B45309 (dark amber)
Energy bolt stroke: #FBBF24 (gold, dashed animated, 3px)
Cloud fill: #FFFFFF (optional, 80% opacity)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Panel on left of frame. Sun upper-center. House on right. Energy flows panel в†’ house via bolt path.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (5.0s loopable):
0вЂ“0.5s: Ground and sky background establish (fade in, ease-out).
0.5вЂ“0.8s: House silhouette slides up from ground (Y: +40px в†’ 0, ease-out spring).
0.8вЂ“1.1s: Panel and mount reveal (scale 0 в†’ 1.0, spring).
1.1вЂ“1.5s: Solar cells fill in one by one (each cell scales 0в†’1.0, 0.06s stagger, grid fills Lв†’R topв†’bottom).
1.5вЂ“1.8s: Sun fades in + scales 0.8 в†’ 1.0 (ease-out spring).
1.8вЂ“2.2s: Sun rays draw outward (each ray: dashoffset 100%в†’0%, 0.05s stagger per ray, ease-out).
2.2вЂ“2.6s: Solar cells transition pale в†’ dark blue (each cell sequentially, 0.06s stagger, ease-out) вЂ” "charging" state.
2.6вЂ“3.5s (looping): Energy bolt dashes animate along path from panel to house (stroke-dashoffset animated continuously, 0.8s per cycle, linear). Houses glows warmly (opacity pulse 1.0в†’1.2в†’1.0 on house fill, ease-in-out).
3.5вЂ“4.5s: Sun pulses glow (blur 0в†’20pxв†’0px, ease-in-out, 1s cycle, loops).
4.5вЂ“5.0s: All elements hold. Loop resets.

EASING CURVES:
- Entry elements: ease-out / spring
- Cell charge: ease-out
- Energy bolt: linear
- Sun glow: ease-in-out
